2.desc_resolved:
Your basic attack has lifesteal.
Your spells have 50% lifesteal.

OneWithNothing.name: PASSIVE_ONEWITHNOTHING_NAME
OneWithNothing.desc_resolved: If you end your turn with 0 mana, your Mana Regeneration is doubled.

2.desc_resolved:
If you end your turn with 0 mana, your Mana Regeneration is doubled.
Bonus ability: Slit Wrists

BedBugs.name: PASSIVE_BEDBUGS_NAME
BedBugs.desc_resolved: You start battles with 2 beefy leech familiars.

2.desc_resolved: You start battles with 4 beefy leech familiars.

WormLord.name: PASSIVE_WORMLORD_NAME
WormLord.desc_resolved: When you take damage, spawn a leech familiar.

2.desc_resolved:
When you take damage, spawn a leech familiar.
Your basic attack spawns leech familiars.

InfiniteRebirth.name: PASSIVE_INFINITEREBIRTH_NAME
InfiniteRebirth.desc_resolved: At the end of each round, if there is a body on the map and you're downed, you respawn on that tile with 1 HP and +10 temporary Speed. If that body was a party member, you spawn with full HP instead.

2.desc_resolved: At the end of each round, if there is a body on the map and you're downed, you respawn on that tile with 25% HP and +10 temporary Speed. If that body was a party member, you spawn with full HP instead.

SacrificialLamb.name: PASSIVE_SACRIFICIALLAMB_NAME
SacrificialLamb.desc_resolved: When you're downed, allies gain All Stats Up and take an extra turn.

2.desc_resolved:
When you're downed, allies gain All Stats Up and take an extra turn.
You can't get injuries.

DeathIncarnate.name: PASSIVE_SERVUSMORTEM_NAME
DeathIncarnate.desc_resolved: Destroy a random non-boss enemy at the start of each battle.

2.desc_resolved: Destroy a random enemy at the start of each battle. If this hits a boss, deal 50 damage instead.

OffloadPain.name: PASSIVE_OFFLOADPAIN_NAME
OffloadPain.desc_resolved: When you heal, deal 1 damage to each enemy.

2.desc_resolved: When you heal, deal 2 damage to each enemy and you gain +1 Thorns.

CambionConception.name: PASSIVE_CAMBIONCONCEPTION_NAME
CambionConception.desc_resolved: When you're downed, spawn a demon kitten familiar.

2.desc_resolved: When you're downed, spawn 2 demon kitten familiars.

Leechmother.name: PASSIVE_LEECHMOTHER_NAME
Leechmother.desc_resolved: Your basic attack spawns a leech familiar.

2.desc_resolved: Your basic attack spawns a beefy leech familiar.

Infected.name: PASSIVE_INFECTED_NAME
Infected.desc_resolved: When you down a unit, reanimate it with 50% HP.

2.desc_resolved: When you down a unit, reanimate it with full HP.

LastGasp.name: PASSIVE_LASTGRASP_NAME
LastGasp.desc_resolved:
When you're downed, deal 6 damage to each enemy and heal 6 HP to all allies.
Bonus ability: Seppuku

2.desc_resolved:
When you're downed, deal 10 damage to each enemy and heal 10 HP to all allies.
Bonus ability: Seppuku

RelentlessDead.name: PASSIVE_RELENTLESSDEAD_NAME
RelentlessDead.desc_resolved: At the end of each round, spawn a zombie kitten familiar onto a random tile.

2.desc_resolved: At the end of each round, spawn 2 zombie kitten familiars onto random tiles.

ChainsOfGuilt.name: PASSIVE_CHAINSOFGUILT_NAME
ChainsOfGuilt.desc_resolved: When an enemy downs you and it wasn't a boss, it joins your party permanently.

2.desc_resolved: When an enemy downs you and it wasn't a boss, it joins your party permanently. If it was a boss, inflict Stun 3 on it.

DarkPriest.name: PASSIVE_DARKPRIEST_NAME
DarkPriest.desc_resolved: At the start of each battle, if you don't have a weapon, gain a temporary Soul Dagger weapon.

2.desc_resolved: At the start of each battle, if you don't have a weapon, gain a temporary Soul Dagger weapon. You can use your weapon action an extra time each turn.

Undeath.name: PASSIVE_UNDEATH_NAME
Undeath.desc_resolved: When you're downed, reanimate each ally to 33% HP. (Once per battle.)

2.desc_resolved: When you're downed, reanimate each ally to max HP. (Once per battle.)

NumbingLeeches.name: PASSIVE_NUMBINGLEECHES_NAME
NumbingLeeches.desc_resolved: Your basic attack deals 0 damage but its status and hit effects are tripled.

2.desc_resolved:
Your basic attack deals 0 damage, but its status and hit effects are tripled.
Your basic attack inflicts Mana Leech.

EternalHealth.name: PASSIVE_ETERNALHEALTH_NAME
EternalHealth.desc_resolved: Suffer only Jinxed when downed. When your party wins a battle, if you were downed, heal to full.

2.desc_resolved: Suffer only Jinxed when downed. When your party wins a battle, if you were downed, heal to full. Your body is indestructible. When you're downed, allies get +1 [img:lck] for each Jinxed injury you have.

Torpor.name: PASSIVE_TORPOR_NAME
Torpor.desc_resolved: While you're downed, your basic attack is Haunt. Your body gains +6 corpse HP.

2.desc_resolved: While you're downed, your basic attack is Haunt and your spells are Spook. Your body gains +6 corpse HP.

SoulBound.name: PASSIVE_SOULBOND_NAME
SoulBound.desc_resolved: Your basic attack inflicts Soul Link.

2.desc_resolved: Your basic attack inflicts Soul Link. Inflict Soul Link on a random enemy at the start of the battle.

Superstition.name: PASSIVE_SUPERSTITION_NAME
Superstition.desc_resolved:
Your basic attack inflicts -1[img:lck]. 
When a unit damages you, inflict -1[img:lck] on it.

2.desc_resolved:
Your basic attack inflicts -1[img:lck] and has a 15% chance to inflict Fear.
When a unit damages you, inflict -1[img:lck] and a 15% to Fear on it.

ImmortalLeeches.name: PASSIVE_IMMORTALLEECHES_NAME
ImmortalLeeches.desc_resolved: When a unit you inflicted Leeches on dies or loses its leeches, your next basic attack inflicts that many additional leeches.

2.desc_resolved:
When a unit you inflicted Leeches on dies or loses its leeches, your next basic attack inflicts that many additional leeches.
Your basic attack inflicts +1 leech.

CorpseConnoisseur.name: PASSIVE_CORPSECONNOISSEUR_NAME
CorpseConnoisseur.desc_resolved:
Start each battle with 2-3 corpses near you.
When you destroy a corpse, heal 2 HP and spawn a food pickup.

2.desc_resolved:
Start each battle with 3-4 corpses near you.
When you destroy a corpse, heal 8 HP and spawn a food pickup.

Parasitic.name: PASSIVE_PARASITIC_NAME
Parasitic.desc_resolved: When you gain health, spawn a leech familiar.

2.desc_resolved: When you gain health, spawn a leech familiar. 50% of the time, spawn a beefy leech instead.

SpreadSorrow.name: PASSIVE_SPREADSORROW_NAME
SpreadSorrow.desc_resolved: When you inflict a debuff to an enemy, inflict that same debuff on another random enemy.

2.desc_resolved: When you inflict a debuff to an enemy, inflict that same debuff on 2 other random enemies.
